film.title: Ragamuffin
film.overview: A 12-year-old motocross racer spends what seems like an average race weekend at the track with her father. But as things unfold, she’s faced with her identity, her deafness, and what it means to be a girl.

dialogues.dialogue: I know your whole life story.  I know every skeleton in your closet.  I know every moment of sin and shame and dishonesty  and degraded love that's darkened your past.  Right now, I know your shallow faith, your feeble prayer life,
